g.text: Raft Consensus: Leader Completeness Proof Sketch
1. Assume | N5 elected but missing entry E
2. Fact | N5 received votes from M2 quorum
3. Fact | Intersection M1 ∩ M2 contains node V
4. Fact | V has E and V granted vote to N5
6. Result | N5 must have E (Assumption 1 is False)
Q.E.D. Entry E is guaranteed to be in N5's log.

ul.li: Entry E is replicated on stable storage

g.text: Quorum M1 | {N1, N2, N3} (E is here)

div.p: Pigeonhole Principle In Raft, any two majorities must overlap. At least one node (N2 or N3) has Entry E AND voted for N5.
Safety Guard Since Voter V has E, N5's log must be at least as complete as V's log to receive V's vote.

text.tspan: // Voter V (N2 or N3) in RequestVote:

g.text: return Reject // Candidate log is older
return Reject // Candidate log is shorter

text.tspan: // Voter V (N2 or N3) in RequestVote:
